risk_title: Political and Governance Instability Affecting Implementation
risk_summary: Political and governance risks are rated as High and have remained consistently high since project approval, indicating persistent fragility in the operating environment that constrains project implementation capacity.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Political and Governance - Rating at Approval: High, Last Approved Rating: High, Proposed Rating: High

risk_summary: Macroeconomic risks are rated as High across all assessment periods, suggesting persistent economic fragility that may affect project financing, implementation costs, and beneficiary capacity to participate in livelihood activities.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Macroeconomic - Rating at Approval: High, Last Approved Rating: High, Proposed Rating: High

risk_summary: Fiduciary risk has escalated from Substantial at approval to High in current assessment, indicating emerging governance and financial management challenges that may be linked to institutional capacity constraints in a fragile context.
evidence_quote: Fiduciary - Rating at Approval: Substantial, Last Approved Rating: Substantial, Proposed Rating: High

risk_summary: Stakeholder risk has escalated from Substantial to High, suggesting emerging tensions or resistance from affected communities that may reflect governance fragility or inadequate consultation in flood-affected areas.
evidence_quote: Stakeholders - Rating at Approval: Substantial, Last Approved Rating: Substantial, Proposed Rating: High

risk_title: Slow Physical Progress Due to Procedural Delays
risk_summary: Implementation progress remains slow due to procedural delays despite preparatory progress, indicating institutional capacity constraints and governance challenges affecting on-the-ground delivery in a post-disaster context.
evidence_quote: significant preparatory headway has been made with appointment of the Project Director, filling in of FPMU positions, hiring of a Deputy Project Director for PMD PIU, filling in of the positions within HRU; physical progress has remained slow owing to procedural delays
